## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues

- Closes #

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `go test ./cxml/...`
- [ ] I added/updated tests for changed behavior
- [ ] I kept changes focused and backward-compatible (or documented breakage)
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
